report.summary: UX audited 2 new learn guides (DeFi Insurance, DVT), added hover/focus interaction patterns to both pages, added mobile scroll hint, and created 6 missing OG images for recent pages lacking social sharing cards.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Both pages: Added glass-card hover effects (translateY(-3px) + indigo border glow + box-shadow) to related article cards
Both pages: Added focus-visible outline styles (2px solid #6366f1) for keyboard navigation on all TOC links and related article cards
Both pages: Added prefers-reduced-motion media query to disable hover animations for accessibility compliance
DeFi Insurance: Added mobile scroll hint text above protocol comparison table
Verified both pages have proper aria-labels on scrollable table regions, tabIndex for keyboard access
Confirmed breadcrumb navigation, Table of Contents, FAQ schema, and disclaimer sections all present on both pages
Verified responsive typography using clamp() on all headings (28px-48px range)
Noted minor typography inconsistency: DVT page uses 16px body text vs Insurance page 15px — flagged for future normalization

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: web3-gaming-gamefi-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG, purple-cyan theme, game controller icon)
OG image: tokenized-real-estate-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG, amber-green theme, building icon)
OG image: crypto-portfolio-allocation-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG, indigo-teal theme, pie chart icon)
OG image: crypto-on-ramps-off-ramps-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG, green-blue theme, up/down arrows icon)

OG image: onchain-privacy-infrastructure-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG, indigo-purple theme, lock/shield icon)

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: /learn/defi-insurance-protocols-guide-2026 — Good structure: breadcrumbs, TOC, 8 sections, protocol comparison table with cards, step-by-step flow, FAQ, related articles, disclaimer. Fixes applied: hover effects, focus styles, scroll hint.

/learn/distributed-validator-technology-dvt-guide-2026 — Good structure: breadcrumbs, TOC, 8 sections, SSV vs Obol comparison table, key takeaways box, FAQ, related articles, disclaimer. Fixes applied: hover effects, focus styles.

sections.title: Deferred Items
items: Body text font-size inconsistency (15px vs 16px) between learn guide pages — recommend normalizing to 15px site-wide
Consider extracting shared style block into a reusable LearnArticle wrapper component to avoid duplication
Related article links on insurance page reference potentially non-existent pages (stablecoin-depeg-risks, defi-risk-scanner) — verify these routes exist
